_review_reason: Pure earnings card. 5x cititravel.com (attractions/cars/hotels), 3x EV/gas/transit/supermarkets + Self-Select category (Fitness/Streaming/Live Entertainment/Salons/Pet). ThankYou Points (not USD credits). No statement credits documented. Note: $100 hotel credit on $500+ booking is on Strata PREMIER ($95 AF), not the no-AF Strata.
